notes: Light Omega AX grid (Nighthound), recaptured 2026-07-08 with the corrected crew/summons (Grand Sandalphon in backline; one Metatron replaced by Lu Woh 3-star). The Sandalphon A/B pair (with: 60/400, without: 40/380) proves THREE mechanisms: Selas Arche = +20 normal AND +20 omega (character Arche supports hit both frames), the six-dragon sub-aura channel (Lu Woh sub = +20 to the normal enhancement, tiers 10/20/40 by uncap), and the astral weapons' elemental_enhance is OPTIMUS-ONLY (omega without Selas = exactly Lumi 340 + Wedges 30 + Pijiu 10). Omega x5.0: Might 124 = base 77.5 x 1.6. Lumi Sword Omega x4, Flamma Orbis MH (Sunveil's Crown), True Purity Sunblade, Huanglong Katana, Sword of Renunciation tr3 = SL20 (β + Temptation), Cosmic Sword (Azure Discipline = DMG cap 1%/sabre).
